last_substantive_baseline.title: Promote read-only report publication planner
last_substantive_baseline.claim_boundary: This baseline proves the guarded workflow exists and OIDC authentication succeeded in run 29957833049. It does not prove complete RBAC inventory, ARM validation, What-If completion, deployment, report publication, or frontend ingestion.

repository_observation.head_semantics: PR #38 merge commit observed before the bounded RBAC-query repair branch was opened
repository_observation.claim_boundary: This is time-bounded external evidence, not a self-updating claim. Resolve current head, pull requests, and CI from live GitHub whenever the file is read.

authored_change.write_owner: ChatGPT conversation: Azure IaC MSP Lab — bounded planner compatibility repair explicitly authorized by Anthony Edgar with 'Proceed'
authored_change.scope: Repair only the read-only report-publication planner's scoped RBAC inventory commands and evidence-file handling after workflow run 29957833049 failed because Azure CLI rejects --scope combined with --all. Add regression tests and update project handoff records. No workflow authority expansion, deployment, RBAC mutation, Storage change, guest command, frontend change, or Azure resource mutation is permitted.
verification_criteria: both scoped az role assignment list commands omit --all and retain --include-inherited
Azure command output is written to a temporary file and promoted only after non-empty expected-type JSON validation
failed or invalid RBAC capture leaves no final evidence file that could be misread as an empty assignment inventory
planner remains read-only and contains no Azure mutation commands
bash syntax, project validation, all unit tests, and Bicep lint/build pass for the exact pull-request head
final diff remains limited to the four declared paths
authored_change.failure_behavior: Keep the pull request draft, inspect the exact failing test or CI job, patch only the four permitted paths, and obtain fresh exact-head CI. Do not weaken OIDC, protected-environment, exact-commit, confirmation, cost, artifact, or no-mutation controls.
authored_change.rollback: Close the pull request without merge or revert its repository-only commits. No Azure rollback applies because this repair performs no Azure authentication or Azure mutation.

bounded_authority_grants.authorization_source: Explicit user instruction 'Proceed' after the read-only Azure planning boundary was stated
bounded_authority_grants.claim_boundary: This grant authorizes authentication and dispatch only for current-state inventory, ARM validation, and What-If. It does not authorize deployment, role changes, report publication, endpoint configuration, guest commands, or any Azure resource mutation.

completed_increments.title: Add fail-closed collector recovery evidence schemas
Reconcile PR34 merge and project state
Decouple live report publication from collector compute

resolved_repository_items.title: Define collector recovery evidence schemas
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

resolved_repository_items.title: Repair collector recovery evidence review findings
resolved_repository_items.claim_boundary: Historical branch only; not repository authority.

proven: resource group and collector identity observations were captured
no Azure mutation was authorized or performed
latest_observed_planner_attempt.failure: Azure CLI rejected az role assignment list because --scope and --all were combined; the resulting zero-byte final RBAC file is not evidence of zero assignments.

latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest successfully promoted Azure evidence. Planner run 29957833049 authenticated and captured partial current evidence but failed before complete RBAC inventory, ARM validation, and What-If; it must not be promoted as a completed plan.

pr37_publication_design.claim_boundary: Repository-design and read-only planning-path acceptance only; not Azure execution, publication, or frontend live-data proof.

pr38_planner_promotion.claim_boundary: The workflow authority controls and OIDC path worked, but the planner did not complete RBAC inventory, validation, or What-If.

authority_defaults.rule: Defaults remain fail-closed. A validated bounded_authority_grants entry may authorize a narrowly scoped exception; no grant may imply Azure mutation authority unless explicitly recorded.

live_state_resolution.repository_head: Query the live GitHub default branch at read time.
live_state_resolution.pull_requests: Query live open pull requests at read time.
live_state_resolution.ci: Query workflow runs and jobs for the exact commit under evaluation.
live_state_resolution.azure: Use fresh authenticated Azure evidence; repository declarations and historical artifacts are insufficient.
